## Required Checks

- [ ] `docs/project/tasklist.md` updated
- [ ] Progress percentage updated
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] OpenAPI updated or confirmed unaffected
- [ ] ADR updated or confirmed unaffected
- [ ] `make format` passed
- [ ] `make lint` passed
- [ ] `make analyse` passed
- [ ] `make test` passed
- [ ] `make build` passed
- [ ] `make verify` passed
